content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt (en-US) explicitly says "public beta" and "still testing… expect rough edges", which may trigger review questions about an unfinished build.
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 rejects apps presented as betas, trials, or demos on the App Store, and reviewers do read the "What's New" text. The en-US release notes call this a "public beta" with rough edges, directly signaling an unfinished product. Rewrite the release notes to describe the sync feature as shipped functionality (and route beta messaging through TestFlight instead).
